hero.title: Welcome to TC Hardt
hero.description: Tennisclub Hardt is the meeting place for young and old to experience sports community and competition!

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Our philosophy for a great community.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.desc: We warmly welcome all members and guests.

fairness.title: Fairness
fairness.desc: We attach great importance to fair play and respectful interaction.

fun.title: Joy of Playing
fun.desc: The fun of sport is our priority.

cta_bottom.title: Join our Tennis Family
cta_bottom.description: Come by, we look forward to seeing you!

about.title: Our Club
about.description: Tennisclub Hardt 1976 e.V. is a tennis club with heart and soul in the middle of Hardt.
about.text: In the immediate vicinity of the SC Hardt district sports facility and right next to the Hardter Wald, our tennis facility shines with a fantastic location. Our club will celebrate its 50th anniversary in 2026.

teams.title: Our Teams
teams.subtitle: Strong together on the court
teams.description: Whether young or experienced, ambitious or just for fun – our teams are the sporting heart of TC Hardt.

training.title: Training
training.subtitle: The right thing for every level

facility.title: Courts & Facility
facility.courts_desc: Our courts were completely renovated for the 2023 season.
facility.clubhouse_desc: The living room of TC Hardt with a large sun terrace.

sponsoring.title: Sponsoring
sponsoring.subtitle: Moving more together
sponsoring.description: Our sponsors are an important part of the TC Hardt family. They support not only tennis, but also youth work.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We look forward to your message!
